name: invoiceCalculation
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.lineItems.every(function(l){ return Number.isFinite(l.lineTotal); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/billing.js, registerLensAction → dispatch key 'billing.invoiceCalculation'); the /lenses/billing page reaches it via useRunArtifact (artifact path) with input as both artifact.data and params. Deterministic pure compute, no DB/LLM. MONEY-PATH GUARD (2026-06-27): every numeric input (quantity/unitPrice/taxRate/tier.pricePerUnit/discount.value/exchangeRate) routes through `finNum` — parseFloat then collapse non-finite OR |v|>1e12 to 0 — so a poisoned '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' or a finite-but-absurd 1e308 (which overflows to Infinity at the ×100 cents step) can never poison subtotal/afterDiscount/tax/total; every aggregate stays FINITE (fail-CLOSED on the compute path). Pinned by server/tests/billing-lens-macros.test.js. Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS path); authored spec.
